_doc: Machine-readable release baselines for M3 BRR encoder quality milestone. M3.2 expands the atom render → BRR encode → metric coverage with nine new edge-case fixtures synthesized in core/tests/atom_edge_cases.rs: amplitude_zero (load-bearing for M3.3 phase-rotation tie-breaker), all_partials_zero_normalize_true (normalize max==0 special case), two_partials_cancel_partially (FP-noise-amplification surface), max_amplitude_no_normalize + normalize_false_multi_partial_clamp_safety (i16 clamping), harmonic_16_cycle_64 (near-Nyquist content), all_8_partials_max_amp_harmonics_1_to_8 (full partial bank), phase_cycles_0_9999 (phase wraparound boundary), cycle_256_canonical_sine (cycle-length parity for the existing 64/128 baselines). Atom PCM SHAs are identity-gated across milestones per the SPEC §16.9 amendment; BRR / decoded-BRR-PCM SHAs and metric values are documentary_snapshot, expected to shift at M3.3 phase rotation. Three classifications: identity_gated (any drift = regression), behavior_gated (numeric thresholds documenting policy), documentary_snapshot (informational; expected to shift on declared milestones).

identity_gated.name: M2_ATOM_128_SINE_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated.locked_at: M2.2 (reclassified to identity_gated at M3.1 per SPEC §16.9 amendment)
identity_gated._note: Atom PCM render formula locked at M2.0 SPEC §16.9; stability rule promoted to a hard contract at M3.0. M3 encoder work (phase rotation §10.7, predictor §10.8, pre-emphasis §10.9) MUST NOT shift this value.

identity_gated.name: M2_ATOM_64_SINE_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated.locked_at: M2.2 (reclassified to identity_gated at M3.1 per SPEC §16.9 amendment)
identity_gated._note: Same stability rule as the 128-sample atom.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Atom with amplitude=0 renders all-zero PCM (SHA of 256 zero bytes). Load-bearing for the M3.3 phase-rotation tie-breaker — all candidates tie at loop_click_abs=0, lex objective falls through to peak_abs_error/rms_error/rotation_offset which must default to no-rotation.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_PARTIALS_ZERO_NORMALIZE_TRUE_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Exercises the normalize max==0 special case in render_to_pcm (max == 0 → skip divide, leaves x all-zero). Produces identical all-zero PCM as M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO; same SHA. No divide-by-zero; no NaN.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_TWO_PARTIALS_CANCEL_PARTIALLY_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Two equal-amplitude partials with phase_cycles 0.0 and 0.5 cancel mathematically (sin(θ) + sin(θ+π) = 0) but FP sin is not exact — sum is a ULP-scale noise floor. normalize then divides by tiny max, amplifying noise to ±1.0; * amplitude * 32767 produces non-trivial PCM. The PCM is deterministic and bounded; no NaN. PM may revisit whether normalize should treat near-zero max as zero at M3+ (SPEC §16.9 amendment territory).

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_MAX_AMPLITUDE_NO_NORMALIZE_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: 4 partials at harmonics 1..=4, all amp=1.0, normalize=false, atom.amplitude=1.0. Raw sum exceeds 1.0 in places; PCM clamps to ±32767. Tests the round-half-away-from-zero scaler's defensive clamp.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_NORMALIZE_FALSE_MULTI_PARTIAL_CLAMP_SAFETY_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Most aggressive overflow path: 8 partials at harmonics 1..=8, all amp=1.0, normalize=false. f64 accumulator has plenty of headroom; verifies anyway.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_HARMONIC_16_CYCLE_64_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Single partial at harmonic=16, cycle_len_samples=64. Near-Nyquist content (16/64 = quarter sample rate). Critical for M3.4 predictor optimization and M3.6 pre-emphasis — high-frequency content is where BRR predictor degenerates and pre-emphasis presets diverge.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_8_PARTIALS_MAX_AMP_HARMONICS_1_TO_8_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Full partial-bank stress: 8 partials at harmonics 1..=8, amp=1.0, normalize=true, atom.amplitude=1.0. Bright high-harmonic content.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_PHASE_CYCLES_0_9999_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Single partial, phase_cycles=0.9999. Phase wraparound boundary. Produces a near-phase=0 waveform; loop_click_abs is 1196 (vs 1197 for the canonical phase=0 sine_128 atom) — off by 1 due to the tiny shift.

identity_gated.name: M3_ATOM_CYCLE_256_CANONICAL_SINE_PCM_SHA256
identity_gated._note: Canonical sine at cycle_len_samples=256 — parity with the existing 64/128 canonical baselines. loop_click_abs is 606 (smaller than 128's 1197 because larger cycle means smaller last-sample magnitude).

behavior_gated.name: M3_LOOP_CLICK_METRIC_GATING
behavior_gated.rule: M3 sub-passes gate on loop_click_abs only (SPEC §10.6); loop_window_rms_delta is diagnostic-only (reports-only) and may promote to a gate at M4+ after the metric has stabilized

behavior_gated.name: M3_PHASE_ROTATION_OBJECTIVE
behavior_gated.rule: phase rotation candidate selection uses lexicographic ordering per SPEC §10.7, not a weighted score; smaller rotation_offset wins on full ties (defaulting to no-rotation)

behavior_gated.name: M3_PHASE_ROTATION_CANDIDATE_SET
behavior_gated.rule: candidate offsets are multiples of 16 only: 0, 16, 32, ..., cycle_len_samples - 16 (4 candidates for cycle 64, 8 for cycle 128, 16 for cycle 256); non-block-aligned reserved for M4+ per SPEC §10.7

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_128_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 loop_click_abs (SPEC §10.6) for canonical sine_128 atom under the M2.2 encoder. M3.3 phase rotation MUST produce a value <= this (lexicographic objective per SPEC §10.7). Matches the M2.2 M2_ATOM_128_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_SCORE = 1197 value exactly — same formula, M3.1 just promotes it from encoder-internal to a formal SPEC-defined metric on the decoded BRR PCM.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_64_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 loop_click_abs for canonical sine_64 atom. M3.3 phase rotation MUST produce a value <= this. Matches M2_ATOM_64_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_SCORE = 2407 exactly.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_128_SINE_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic windowed metric (SPEC §10.6, window=8) for canonical sine_128 atom under M2.2 encoder. Reports-only at M3; informational baseline.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_64_SINE_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Same; reports-only.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_128_SINE_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: SHA-256 of decoded-from-BRR PCM (little-endian i16 bytes) for sine_128 atom under M2.2 encoder. M3.3 phase rotation will shift this. Documentary snapshot — expected to shift.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_64_SINE_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Same; expected to shift at M3.3.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for amplitude_zero fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Equals the all-zero PCM SHA — BRR encode of all-zero PCM round-trips to all-zero decoded PCM.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: All-zero PCM has no seam. M3.3 phase rotation MUST NOT make this worse (lexicographic objective per §10.7); all rotation candidates tie and the smaller-offset tie-breaker selects rotation_offset=0 by default.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_AMPLITUDE_ZERO_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic-only; perfect-seam value.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_PARTIALS_ZERO_NORMALIZE_TRUE_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Identical BRR to amplitude_zero — both produce all-zero PCM.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_PARTIALS_ZERO_NORMALIZE_TRUE_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: All-zero decoded PCM.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_PARTIALS_ZERO_NORMALIZE_TRUE_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Perfect-seam value.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_PARTIALS_ZERO_NORMALIZE_TRUE_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic-only; perfect-seam value.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_TWO_PARTIALS_CANCEL_PARTIALLY_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the FP-noise-amplified cancellation fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_TWO_PARTIALS_CANCEL_PARTIALLY_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_TWO_PARTIALS_CANCEL_PARTIALLY_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Loop click on the noise-amplified waveform. M3.3 phase rotation must produce <= this value.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_TWO_PARTIALS_CANCEL_PARTIALLY_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_MAX_AMPLITUDE_NO_NORMALIZE_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the i16-clamping fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_MAX_AMPLITUDE_NO_NORMALIZE_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_MAX_AMPLITUDE_NO_NORMALIZE_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Large seam — the no-normalize multi-partial signal has aggressive content. M3.3 phase rotation must produce <= this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_MAX_AMPLITUDE_NO_NORMALIZE_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_NORMALIZE_FALSE_MULTI_PARTIAL_CLAMP_SAFETY_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the 8-partial overflow-safety fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_NORMALIZE_FALSE_MULTI_PARTIAL_CLAMP_SAFETY_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_NORMALIZE_FALSE_MULTI_PARTIAL_CLAMP_SAFETY_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Large seam — 8-partial unnormalized signal. M3.3 phase rotation must produce <= this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_NORMALIZE_FALSE_MULTI_PARTIAL_CLAMP_SAFETY_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_HARMONIC_16_CYCLE_64_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for near-Nyquist fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_HARMONIC_16_CYCLE_64_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_HARMONIC_16_CYCLE_64_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Near-Nyquist content; BRR predictor degenerates at this frequency. The decoded PCM at seam ends at i16::MAX/2-ish magnitude versus zero at the loop start.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_HARMONIC_16_CYCLE_64_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic-only. The decoded PCM has a strong period-4 structure that aligns first-8 and last-8 windows; windowed delta is zero.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_8_PARTIALS_MAX_AMP_HARMONICS_1_TO_8_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the full-partial-bank fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_8_PARTIALS_MAX_AMP_HARMONICS_1_TO_8_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_8_PARTIALS_MAX_AMP_HARMONICS_1_TO_8_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Full-bank bright signal; M3.3 phase rotation must produce <= this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_ALL_8_PARTIALS_MAX_AMP_HARMONICS_1_TO_8_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_PHASE_CYCLES_0_9999_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the phase-wraparound boundary fixture. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_PHASE_CYCLES_0_9999_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_PHASE_CYCLES_0_9999_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Off-by-one from canonical sine_128 atom's 1197 — phase=0.9999 shift produces a near-identical waveform with a tiny seam difference.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_PHASE_CYCLES_0_9999_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only. Near-identical to the canonical sine_128 atom's 26745.84 — phase wraparound preserved as designed.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_CYCLE_256_CANONICAL_SINE_BRR_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Pre-M3 BRR SHA for the cycle-256 canonical sine. M3.3 phase rotation may shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_CYCLE_256_CANONICAL_SINE_DECODED_BRR_PCM_SHA256_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: M3.3 phase rotation will shift this.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_CYCLE_256_CANONICAL_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_ABS_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Smaller seam than the cycle-128 atom (1197): larger cycle, smaller last-sample magnitude.

documentary_snapshot.name: M3_ATOM_CYCLE_256_CANONICAL_SINE_LOOP_WINDOW_RMS_DELTA_PRE_M3
documentary_snapshot._note: Diagnostic; reports-only.
